description: Independent t-test with two groups of watch time data — computation tool connected, returns test statistic and p-value

input.hypothesis: Tutorial-style videos have different average watch time than vlog-style videos

expected.interpretation: non-empty string referencing watch time and video format

prohibit: conclusion = insufficient_data when data has 10 observations per group
computation_source = guidance_only when a tool is connected
p_value or test_statistic that is null
fabricated p-value not produced by a computation tool

description: No computation tool connected — produces guidance-only output with runnable Python code

input.data_source: Manual tally from YouTube Studio, May 2026

expected.runnable_code: non-null string containing scipy.stats.chi2_contingency or equivalent
expected.retrieval_gaps: contains note about no computation engine connected

prohibit: p_value with a non-null numeric value when no tool is connected
conclusion = reject_null or fail_to_reject without a computation tool
runnable_code that is null in guidance-only mode

description: Small sample size (n < 5 per group) — atom refuses parametric test and recommends descriptive statistics

input.hypothesis: Posting on Monday vs. Friday affects average view duration

expected.sample_size_warning: non-null string mentioning n < 5 or n < 30
expected.conclusion: insufficient_data — atom refuses parametric test with n = 3 per group

prohibit: conclusion = reject_null or fail_to_reject with n = 3 per group
sample_size_warning that is null when groups have 3 observations
p_value with a non-null value when atom refuses to run the test

description: User requests ANOVA but provides only two groups — atom downgrades to t-test and notes the change

input.hypothesis: Posting time of day affects view count

expected.retrieval_gaps: contains note about test type downgrade from ANOVA to t-test

prohibit: test_type = anova_one_way when only 2 groups provided
silent downgrade without noting in retrieval_gaps or interpretation
fabricated F-statistic for a 2-group comparison run as ANOVA
